description: Establish the foundational framework for the high-capacity metropolitan fiber network deployment across the northern urban corridor.

children.description: Develop comprehensive blueprints and schematic diagrams for the underlying physical hardware and logical network pathways for the system.
Create detailed geographical maps illustrating the physical placement of nodes and the primary fiber optic cabling routes for efficiency.
Incorporate existing geographical information system data to ensure accurate physical placement and avoid existing underground utilities.
Identify and verify optimal physical locations for hardware installation based on connectivity requirements and accessibility for maintenance.
Define the encryption standards and firewall configurations necessary to protect the data transmission integrity across the entire grid.
Evaluate and select the most robust cryptographic algorithms to secure sensitive data transmitted through the fiber optic network.
Establish strict authentication protocols for administrative access to the network management interface and physical hardware cabinets.
Commence the physical installation and hardware configuration based on the finalized architectural designs and security protocols established.
Acquire all necessary fiber optic cables, high-speed routers, and specialized signal boosters required for the physical infrastructure.
Finalize contracts with hardware suppliers to ensure timely delivery of high-quality materials within the allocated project budget.
Perform rigorous quality checks on all incoming hardware to ensure compliance with the specified technical requirements and standards.
Coordinate the transportation and secure storage of high-value hardware components at designated staging areas near installation sites.
Execute the necessary excavation and conduit installation required to house the fiber optic cabling safely beneath the city streets.
Utilize specialized equipment to excavate precise pathways for the subterranean conduit network while minimizing disruption to traffic.
Install durable protective housing for the fiber optic cables to prevent damage from environmental factors or future construction activity.
